name: tagcache-monorepo
description: Tagged cache for Cloudflare Workers and edge runtimes
author: Minchul Kwon <mstorm@mstorm.net>

scripts.build: bun run --filter=tagcache build && bun run --filter='@tagcache/*' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter=tagcache typecheck && bun run --filter='@tagcache/*' typecheck
scripts.size: bun run --filter=tagcache size && bun run --filter='@tagcache/*' size
